Bad Wi-Fi feedback can be caused by poor router placement, signal interference, and too many connected devices. To fix it, try restarting your modem, moving the router to a more central and open location, reducing interference from other electronics, and checking for software updates. For persistent issues, contact your internet service provider or consider upgrading your equipment.
